'''ladana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaconess|deaconess]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaconess|deaconess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ladana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædænæth|lædænæth]] || [[word:lædænæj|lædænæj]] || [[word:lædænæsh|lædænæsh]] || [[word:lædænæ|lædænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladadanath|ladadanath]] || [[word:ladadanaj|ladadanaj]] || [[word:ladadanash|ladadanash]] || [[word:ladadana|ladadana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladanath|ladanath]] || [[word:ladanaj|ladanaj]] || [[word:ladanash|ladanash]] || [[word:ladana|ladana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladafnath|ladafnath]] || [[word:ladafnaj|ladafnaj]] || [[word:ladafnash|ladafnash]] || [[word:ladafnaf|ladafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ladanatha|ladanatha]] || [[word:ladanaja|ladanaja]] || [[word:ladanasha|ladanasha]] || [[word:ladanaka|ladanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ladanath|ladanath]] || [[word:ladanaj|ladanaj]] || [[word:ladanash|ladanash]] || [[word:ladana|ladana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ladanathal|ladanathal]] || [[word:ladanajal|ladanajal]] || [[word:ladanashal|ladanashal]] || [[word:ladanakal|ladanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ladanathatha|ladanathatha]] || [[word:ladanajaja|ladanajaja]] || [[word:ladanashasha|ladanashasha]] || [[word:ladanaka|ladanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ladanathan|ladanathan]] || [[word:ladanajan|ladanajan]] || [[word:ladanashan|ladanashan]] || [[word:ladanakan|ladanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ladanathaoro|ladanathaoro]] || [[word:ladanajaoro|ladanajaoro]] || [[word:ladanashaoro|ladanashaoro]] || [[word:ladanakaoro|ladanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
